intro: Heteropappus meyendorffii, also known as Korean crown daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and improve overall immune function. The bioactive constituents of Heteropappus meyendorffii include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
